data.body: STACK COMMIT 1 (#4 G5 spangly-beggarly-blackrhino): a23963ca3. det_floor.decomposition_state_block + veto_undecomposed_g5 (post-Pass-1 seam, not DET_CHECKS); extra_context threaded passes.pass1_chunk<-sizing.pass1_with_ladder<-run_pass1 (G5 chunk only); tests/unit/test_g5_decomp_det.py (13 tests).
